description: Redesign portal as a single scrollable page with all info visible (no tabs/routes), multi-language, phone-friendly
steps: 1. Create a new single-page portal view at panel/panel/web/portal/src/views/SinglePageView.vue that combines all portal content into one scrollable page with sections: (a) Account Status section - plan name, status pill, expiry date, days remaining, (b) Usage Gauge section - data usage with progress bar and remaining display, (c) VPN Profiles section - download buttons for each available profile + subscription URL copy, (d) Support section - create ticket form and list of existing tickets with thread view.

2. Update panel/panel/web/portal/src/router/index.ts: Change the PortalShell children to use a single route that loads SinglePageView.vue as the main content. Keep the login route. Remove separate billing/usage/vpn/support routes (or redirect them to the main page). Keep profile as a modal/section.

3. Update panel/panel/web/portal/src/layouts/PortalShell.vue: Remove tab navigation (desktop nav links and mobile bottom tabs). Keep the header with brand, theme toggle, language, and user menu. The shell becomes a simple header + content layout.

4. Add comprehensive multi-language support to the portal: Expand panel/panel/web/portal/src/i18n.ts with 50+ keys covering all sections (account status, usage labels, VPN profile labels, support form labels, button texts) in en, fa, zh. Use t() for ALL user-visible strings in the new SinglePageView.

5. Ensure phone-friendly layout: Use CSS with mobile-first approach - single column on mobile (< 768px), content sections stack vertically with comfortable touch targets (min 44px tap areas). Use @media queries for responsive adjustments. Cards should fill viewport width on mobile with appropriate padding.

6. Keep the design simple with clear language - no technical jargon. Sections should use icons and clear headings. The support form should be minimal (subject + message only, no priority picker for simplicity).
acceptance_criteria: Portal loads as a single scrollable page showing account status, usage, VPN profiles, and support all at once
No tab navigation exists in the portal (no bottom tabs, no nav links aside from header brand)
All user-visible strings use t() and have translations in en, fa, zh
On mobile viewport (375px), page is usable with no horizontal scroll and comfortable tap targets
VPN profiles section shows download buttons and subscription URL
Support section allows creating tickets and viewing existing ones inline
findings: Portal redesigned as single scrollable page (SinglePageView.vue). All tabs/routes removed, old routes redirect to home. PortalShell simplified to header-only with language switcher, theme toggle, user dropdown. 55+ i18n keys per locale (EN/FA/ZH). Mobile-first CSS with 640px breakpoint. All user-visible strings use t(). vue-tsc and vite build pass cleanly. Router keeps portal-profile route accessible from user dropdown.
